reviews.review_description:
Visually, it is one of its strongest aspects. The stylized, almost Pixar-like art direction works very well in VR and holds up nicely on Quest 3. Environments are colorful and varied, ranging from sunny beaches to underground ruins. The presentation is polished, and the sound design and voice work add a lot to the sense of immersion. The puzzles are generally accessible and designed more for relaxation than challenge.

However, the experience is very short (around 2–3 hours), and the gameplay depth is limited. Some puzzles feel over just as they start to get interesting, and the story remains fairly simple and linear. It often feels like a “light adventure” rather than a fully developed VR puzzle game.

I don’t recommend Epyka when you prefer complex or challenging puzzle design.

Nice puzzles and Graphics!

Highly recommend 


Would love to see a Part 2?
How about adding for Epyka 2 a sore way or portal that you walk thru in Mixed Reality to start the game?

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot! 
We’re really glad you enjoyed the puzzles and graphics, and thanks for the recommendation!
The MR portal idea is nice! We'll keep that in mind!

reviews.review_description: I really can't believe i just got this game for 5 dollars. Definitely one of the deals ever. I mean sharp, magical graphics, deep and challenging enough puzzles. Warm storyline. I haven' t had any glitches or bugs so far. This one is not to be missed if you like puzzle games!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words, Cyberpepper!
We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the puzzles, visuals, and story, and glad everything’s running smoothly. Thanks for the support and enjoy the rest of the adventure! 💛

reviews.review_description:
Further to my problem below: thank you to developer response. But there appears to be no way to respond to you. I have a video (22 minutes long,741 mb) but no way of sending or sharing it with you.  Problem persists and I went back and redid previous scenes . My hand is pressing triggers so hard with fire giant I practically have white knuckles but no real power. How do I share video with you, please?


Game ruined by glitch. I have got as far as the fire giant cave but my laser only works intermittently and sometimes not at all. Previous glitches in earlier scenes have righted themselves if I go in again but
 this one has me stranded. I just have to stand there and be pelted with fire rocks. Help!

developer_response.body:
Hi Julia! Thanks for playing and for taking the time to leave feedback. We’re sorry you’re stuck in the Fire Giant cave.
The laser should work consistently in this section, so this issue is often caused by something small in the environment or by how the tool is being used. Could you please try the following?
Re-enter the level from the previous checkpoint.
Make sure you’re holding the laser with one hand only, and that the trigger is fully pressed.
Check that you’re not accidentally grabbing another object or interacting with the UI at the same time.
If the problem persists, we’d love a bit more detail (video or short description of what you’re doing when it stops firing). You can send it to us and we’ll help you get through the area.

Thanks again for your patience, and we hope you enjoy the rest of the adventure!

reviews.review_description:
Epyka is a delightful VR journey that blends charming Pixar-like visuals, clever puzzles, and the company of an adorable dog into one cozy adventure. The environments feel vibrant and inviting, making exploration genuinely enjoyable, while the puzzles strike a nice balance between thoughtful and accessible.

I particularly like the beautiful Quill illustrations used to bring parts of the story to life, as they add a unique, artistic layer to the narrative that feels magical in VR. Although the adventure is on the shorter side, its heart, polish, and creativity make it a standout experience. If you’re looking for a family-friendly escape filled with warmth and wonder, Epyka is an absolute gem to add to your library.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 💛 We’re thrilled you enjoyed the adventure (and Jack 🐕, of course!). The Quill illustrations are one of our favorite touches too so we’re glad you liked them!

reviews.review_description: Game has glitch want let me advance wasted money. The evil minions first 2 come out and shoot at me so I can return fire but when I kill them the next set come out but will not shoot at me so I can’t advance any further in the game .. thanks for listening

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry for the experience and thank you for describing the bug, we’re currently investigating it.
Since you had a bad experience, if you join our Discord and create a ticket, we’ll be happy to gift you Epyka and guide you on how to go beyond that section of the game. We truly understand that your money is valuable, and we want everyone who supports Epyka to have the best possible experience. : https://discord.gg/Rpc6f6uj

reviews.review_description: I am not much for puzzle games, but this game seems to make the grind fun with your companion dog.  It's a puzzle adventure game worth its low cost.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review!  We’re really glad you enjoyed Epyka, and yep, Jack the dog always brings that extra bit of magic 🐶✨

reviews.review_description:
Short but fun and intriguing puzzle game! 
I loved the interactions with Jack, the doggy companion, it is so cute!

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks so much for playing! We’re glad you enjoyed it! 🐕Jack is definitely the best companion!

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun until the penultimate scenes. Laser discs move around but never fire, crystal’s lasso to catch the volcanic rocks never shows—just totally frustrating. I restarted several times and got it working sometimes , but eventually just gave up after about five restarts. I’m waiting for an update.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hey there! Thanks for flagging this. We've actually tracked down a rare issue where, in a specific spot, player's death wasn't being recorded correctly and it could cause the laser drones to get stuck and stop firing. Good news though - we've fixed it! This update will be rolling out to everyone over the next few days, so you should see it soon.
If you want to chat with us join our Discord: https://discord.gg/WHdZwK7xnN
Thanks a lot!

reviews.review_description:
Good graffic, and great story. 
Love the game so far

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton! So glad you're enjoying the story — we’ve put a lot of heart into it. Hope the journey keeps getting better!

reviews.review_description:
Epyka is a small VR experience that took about 2-3 hours to complete, there were some really fun puzzle elements within the game while there were a handful of initially frustrating ones.

The experience is slow-paced which may be suitable to more players and the game does not punish the players, little to none.

If you would like a VR puzzle experience that are set to easy up to mediocre difficulty, then this may be for you!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review! 🙏 We're really glad you enjoyedthe puzzles. 
Epyka it's designed to be enjoyable by anyone and the puzzles were made to be challeging but not impossible to solve.
If you’d like to share more about why some puzzles were initially frustrating for you, we’re all ears — feel free to chat with us on our Discord: https://discord.gg/WHdZwK7xnN

reviews.review_description: Good fun and good looking. Some of the puzzles take a bit of thinking about

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Some puzzles definitely take a bit of thinking, but they should all be manageable. For the trickier ones, the game will give you a few hints if you’re stuck for a while. And if anyone needs extra help, feel free to reach out, we and the community are happy to help on Discord: https://discord.gg/WHdZwK7xnN

reviews.review_description: Great visual . Enhances content. Glad to have it.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're really glad you're enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: I just finished this game and I'm so sad it's over.  I love this game!! The graphics are so nicely done. The story line was good and the puzzles are challenging but do-able. Such a well put together game. Draws you in right away and will definitely leave you wanting more. Even the interaction with Jack was so well done. I can't say enough about this game.  A must have game!! Nicely done developers!! 👏

developer_response.body:
This means the world to us! 😭 Hearing how much Epyka resonated with you truly makes our day. We poured so much love into this adventure, and knowing it drew you in and left you wanting more is the best feeling! ✨🐶

And Jack? He’s wagging his tail in appreciation. 

Thank you for being part of the journey, and who knows… maybe more adventures await? 

Happy exploring!

reviews.review_title: No save progress. restart from the begin
reviews.review_description:
When I started the game waiting backstage I saw a message for auto save so I thought progress would be saved.
I closed the game after that puzzle stepping through the circles where you have to go through the right way to go to the other side of the room.
Now a few days later I wanted to continue and to my dismay I have to start from the beginning.

While it is a beautiful setup, why no auto save or warning when you try to close to save it somehow.

I will think if I request a refund or go through everything again. Not sure if I want to.. at least not knowing why it's not saved or how I can save it.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We improved the save system in v1.0.3! We added more savepoints and fixes to improve the play experience! We also sent you a way to restore the progresses you lost.

Hey! Sorry for that experience, we are currently investigating this issue to understand if it’s a replicable bug. It would greatly help us if you could provide more details:
Does the game restart from the beginning of the level with circular portals or from the very beginning of the game?

The game saves at specific checkpoints during level loads, and you should see a 'Game Saved' message in the lower-left corner when it happens.

If you'd like to chat directly with the devs about this issue or share additional feedback, feel free to reach us on Discord: https://discord.gg/kDepnv5h

reviews.review_title: A short but fun puzzle title
reviews.review_description: It's only a couple hours long, but for that price, I like that amount of time. The puzzles were challenging and fun, and the story was pretty interesting. It would be really cool if they continue this as a series that delves deeper into the narrative. I hope they continue it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! We’re thrilled to hear you enjoyed the puzzles and story, your support means the world to us! 

We love hearing that players want to delve deeper into the world of Epyka… who knows what mysteries the future might hold? 

Thanks for being part of the adventure!

reviews.review_title: A Welcome Break from the Norm
reviews.review_description: Beautiful environments, fun puzzles, interesting story and a more positive tone that most games on Quest. Short but for only $10, it’s time and money well spent.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind words! We're really glad you enjoyed the game and appreciated its positive vibe. Our goal was to create something different. Hearing that you felt it was time well spent means a lot to us. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
This game is so captivating and so fun. It' leaves you wanting more!
The storyline draws you in, while you and you're trusty companion discover Ancient Mysteries and Puzzles.
The Enviorment is so magical it takes you away and Engages you at every step.
You will not be disappointed getting this game and becoming the Explorer you want to be!
I give this a big Whoop, Whoop!

developer_response.body: Thank you ClassyGrandma for the review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the adventure and felt immersed in Epyka's world. And we have plans for more content! Stay tuned! In the meantime, Jack responds to your "Whoop, Whoop!" with a big "Woof, Woof!" 🐕

reviews.review_description:
I’m just blown away with this game, I love puzzle games so it was already going to appeal to me.

I know it’s cartoony graphics but it just fits, standing on the boat and watching the sharks swim by was a definite highlight, I literally only just started the game and I already know it’s going to make me happy to jump in and play this.

Yes I heard it’s short but it’s the quality not quantity.
And the dog is so adorable as a companion.
Fab work from the single dev.
Definitely add this to your collection.

developer_response.body: Wow, this absolutely made our day! We’re so glad Epyka is already bringing you joy, and we couldn’t agree more-quality over quantity every time! The world, the puzzles, and of course, our adorable companion are all crafted with goodness, and it means so much to hear that it’s resonating with you. Thank you for your support, and we hope you continue to enjoy the adventure!

reviews.review_description:
WOW! Great graphics, nice sounds, beautiful atmosphere, great voice acting, wonderful animations… love the lighting… epic story!

This is one awesome game! 
Story puzzle game… it’s so wonderful! I had to pull myself away, to write this review… it has that “just one more” feeling.

It just feels so nice to play, relaxing and beautiful… what an experience!

You and your companion go on an epic journey… the scenery is stunning!! The puzzles are very fun…  story very involving, all voice acted too.
I felt like Indiana Jones with a dog companion.

This is one of my favourite Quest games to date.. just beautiful!

Highly recommended!!

developer_response.body:
Hearing that Epyka gave you that ‘just one more’ feeling is the highest compliment we could ask for! We poured so much love into the world, the puzzles, and of course, your loyal companion, so knowing it resonated with you means everything.

Indiana Jones with a dog companion? We LOVE that! Thank you so much for your support, and we hope the adventure continues to bring you joy!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful game. Felt like being Tintin in a Pixar movie.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! That’s exactly the kind of adventure feeling we were going for — glad it connected with you!

reviews.review_description: good game. certainly for the price. nicely made and the interaction with the dog is nice. the puzzles are just right. in short, a well made game that has a good price quality ratio.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed the adventure and that Jack made the journey even better.

We put a lot of love into balancing the puzzles and crafting an immersive experience, so it means a lot to hear this!

reviews.review_description:
I wasn't sure what to expect, but from the beginning moments of the game, I was drawn into the premise of the story and loveable Scooby-Doo style companion. The puzzles are intuitive and varied, and the environments are captivating.

Then I saw an Achievement pop up, and I realized this is a game I will be playing until completion. In a time when Meta doesn't know what they are doing with the Achievements system, I love to support devs who still include them in their games, especially when they are like Epyka.

Amazing work!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed Epyka and its story,puzzles and environments (and obviously Jack). We included Achievements as a little extra for players like you who love completing a game to the fullest, and we’re so glad it added to your experience. Let us know if you think we should add a few more! We're always open to listen to feedback on our Discord!

reviews.review_description:
Whomever is giving this game four and five stars are either lying, bots, or have 0 taste. This is an extremely short game - less than two hours in length - and is not engaging in any real way. 

The puzzles are not at all difficult and quite easy to get through. The "action" parts of the game basically hold your hand and there is no risk of failure. Also the world around you is mundane at best, with graphics barely considered middling. 

The dog you cart along on your journey, and the shaman you meet, are pretty useless side characters, neither really adds anything besides one being part of a single puzzle. It's sad they thought any extra characters would help this game. 

There is not much here, and this game is clearly made for brats who run around certain games being racist. Save your money if you have standards, the people giving high ratings are probably paid.

developer_response.body:
Hi Fa1coneri, we’re sorry to hear that the game didn’t meet your expectations. 
Our goal was to create an experience that appeals to a wide range of players seeking a relaxing adventure to enjoy at their own pace. Regarding the game’s length, it can vary greatly depending on a player’s familiarity and skill with puzzle solving. As an indie studio, we chose to focus on creating a shorter, but more polished and cohesive adventure rather than stretching out the experience at the cost of quality.
Also we understand that not every game resonates with everyone, and we truly appreciate your feedback. If you’d like to share more detailed suggestions on how we can improve, we’d love to hear from you directly on our Discord. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: I tried to be patient with it, but I ended up deleting it. I didn’t see the fun in it. Too corny for me. ￼

developer_response.body: Hey! Sorry it didn’t resonate with you! Totally get that—it’s not for everyone. We designed Epyka to be accessible to a wide audience, and puzzles are designed to be challenging but not frustrating. It might feel a bit simple at first, especially for hardcore puzzle players, but later on, there are some more challenging puzzles. If you’d like to share more about what you liked or didn’t like, have a chat with us on our Discord!

reviews.review_description: Game won't advance stuck in spot for 20+ minutes

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your experience! We'd really love to help you progressing in the game and to understand what caused the issue. Could you let us know which level you were on and the last thing you did or saw? Also please join our Discord so our developers can chat with you directly: https://discord.gg/RrbT6QwqCg

reviews.review_title: Family friendly fun for a few hours
reviews.review_description:
Disclaimer: I received the game for free as part of playtesting.  There was no requirement for me to post a positive review however, the thoughts are my own and I would have given it a bad rating if It were bad.

In short, the game is priced just right for what it is.

It's fairly short puzzle game with interesting story. Absolutely developed for VR and using the VR tech properly, which is something I really appreciate in this age of flatscreen projects lazily adapted to VR.
It's not perfect and can sometimes be janky, but nothing game-breaking really.

The target audience for this will be younger people. The puzzles are not too complex, took me less than 2 hours to complete the whole game, but some people take twice as much or longer. 

There is not a lot of replayability but there are some hidden secrets you can collect so it might warrant giving it another go for the collectors.

For comparison, "I Expect You To Die" is a much better game with more challenging puzzles, but it this has more story to it and can be played by the whole family without worrying about the implications in the game, and the kids should be able to solve all the puzzles without prior knowledge as well.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts and for your feedback! We’re glad to hear you appreciated how Epyka embraces VR and delivers an experience that can be enjoyed by everyone! We’re glad you enjoyed the story and puzzles, and your comments about replayability and challenge level are very valuable to us as we think about ways to improve in the future.

reviews.review_description: This is a fabulous game for RV. The story is engaging and the puzzles fun. Really enjoying playing the game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re so happy to hear you’re enjoying the adventure and puzzles!
Bringing Epyka to life has been an incredible journey, and knowing it’s resonating with players like you makes it all the more special.

Happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: This game is fun with puzzles that are challenging without being the kind of challenging that would make me want to give up. The story is interesting and the graphics, especially during the  story telling, are beautiful. Having a dog companion who is also a necessary part of the challenges is fun and unique. I wish the game was a a little bit longer. Recommend for all ages!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words!  We’re thrilled you enjoyed the puzzle difficulty, we put a lot of thought into balancing the challenge to make Epyka fun and engaging without being frustrating.
We totally hear you on the length! As a small indie team, we focused on crafting a shorter, polished experience for our first outing. But we’re really excited about the Epyka universe and definitely hope to expand it in the future!
Thanks again for playing and recommending Epyka! 🐶✨

reviews.review_description: Have to say this game is magical, amazing such a hidden gem, will be recommending to everyone I know who owns a quest, took me by suprise, seriously buy it you won't regret it

developer_response.body: Wow, this absolutely made our day! Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing Epyka with others, it means the world to us! We're so happy the game surprised you in the best way possible.

reviews.review_description: Breath of fresh air.  Engaging visuals, great story, splendid puzzles. For me, I wished it was longer. Let's hope for some DLC.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!😊 We're thrilled you enjoyed the game. We tried to create an original and unique game and it's great to hear that you noticed it! Also thanks for the feedback about the length, we noted it and will definitly make longer experiences in future. If you want to stay tuned, give feedback or just have a chat with us join our Discord: https://discord.gg/kDepnv5h

reviews.review_description:
I Like Adventure Games and this one is for sure worth to play.
It gives it a little twist with the dog.

developer_response.body: We are so glad you liked it! Thank you for taking the time to comment!

reviews.review_description: I hated this game.  Too childish.  You can only save from a few places so I had to completely redo levels several times.    I spent a lot of time just waiting for the narrative parts.

developer_response.body:
We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. We totally understand that every game isn’t for everyone, and we’re always looking to improve the player experience.

Epyka was designed to be an immersive adventure & puzzle game, but we hear your concerns about save points and pacing. We’ll be sure to pass this feedback along to the team as we continue refining the experience.

Thanks again for playing, and we appreciate your perspective!

reviews.review_title: Loved this family friendly puzzle game
reviews.review_description: The characters were fun and the dog was adorable. It’s a very pretty game and the puzzles reasonably challenging. I thoroughly enjoyed it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re glad to hear that you enjoyed the puzzles, characters, and our adorable dog companion Jack. It’s wonderful to know you found the game both fun and visually appealing. If you have any feedback feel free to tell us on our Discord. Thank you for playing and sharing your experience!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant I want more lol

developer_response.body: Thank you! 😊 We'd also love to hear more in detail about what you liked, what you didn’t like, and what you'd love to see in the future. Feel free to share your thoughts with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/zs2rYdsp

reviews.review_description:
Nice puzzler with nice graphics. But there are only a handful of puzzles and even for VR this is very short (1-2 hours). Also, the puzzles difficulty is uneven. The transport puzzle is little bit bigger challenge, but the 2 mazes seem almost unfinished given how easy they are to solve, and they don't utilize the full maze.
Also, there's no replay value as there aren't any exploration areas to collect anything.

I still appreciate these types of games, and this is a lower priced game. But something like Eye of Temple has better value given how much longer the game is and it still has replay value. But granted that's not for kids if that's the target audience intended. But even for kids this won't be a long game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!  We’re aware that Epyka isn’t the longest game out there, an average playthrough is around 2 hours. That said, we’ve seen some puzzle pros finish it a bit quicker, while others took much more (3,4 hours). As a small team we focused on creating a shorter and polished experience this time but we really want to expand this universe.
Regarding the difficulty, Epyka was designed to be an adventure accessible to everyone (not just hardcore puzzle gamers nor kids). While some puzzles might feel less challenging, our goal was to create a relaxing, enjoyable experience without frustration.

As for replayability—there are collectables hidden throughout the game! If you haven’t found them yet, you might want to revisit a few levels.  Small spoiler: the symbols on the empty pillars can be found also at the beginning of few levels. That might be a good place to start your search!😉

Thanks again for playing, and we really appreciate your feedback! If you want to chat with us feel free to hop into our Discord! https://discord.gg/cQhCagfM

reviews.review_description: Epyka is a game where you complete puzzles to get to an end goal (I won't spoil the ending). It's a very well-built game, but somewhat challenging, so you better be sharp! I'll leave the rest to you, reader. Have fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're so glad you enjoyed Epyka, your words means a lot to us, as an indie team we put lot of effort in our first game!

reviews.review_description:
It's a nice little game for when you have some time. However if you are looking for proper puzzles that actually make you think, this game might not be for you.
Barely have I actually had to think to get through the game, leaving me honestly a bit bored. I did however enjoy the few instances when I actually had to think for a bit.
The story and lore of this game are told in a quite appealing way and a creative take on cutscenes. I also enjoyed how much this game reminded me of Atlantis from it's environment and style. There are some new mechanics introduced every now and then which keep the game fresh yet you don't get too use them too much. All in all a sweet little game but not suitable for people who really want to think about puzzles.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the story, lore, and the creative cutscenes. We understand that the puzzles might feel a bit too easy for hardcore puzzles enthusiasts. Our goal was to create a fun and relaxing experience, with puzzles that are accessible to a wide audience, that doesn't become frustrating. We appreciate your thoughts and will definitely take them into account for future updates or games, if you'd like to tell us more about what you'd like to see in future updates/sequels hop into our discord: https://discord.gg/aNFsbxts

reviews.review_description: Thoroughly enjoyed this adventure. Has some great puzzles in it. I enjoyed the main story. It leaves you wanting more. Worth playing

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We're so glad you enjoyed the puzzles and story—it means a lot to us.  😊And a little spoiler: we have plans for more! New adventure on the horizon. If you want to tell us what you'd like to see in future hop into our Discord https://discord.gg/aNFsbxts

reviews.review_description:
This is a nice puzzle game if you're into the genre.
I liked the graphics of the game. The puzzles are not too hard and overall enjoyable. The best thing about the game I think is the companion, a dog companion that makes the game much better.
The game could be a bit longer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great feedback!😊 We're so glad you enjoyed the graphics and the puzzles, and we agree—Jack the dog really adds something special to the experience! 🐾 We appreciate your thoughts on the game's length and will definitely keep that in mind for what will come next. If you have additional feedback you can talk directly with us on Discord: https://discord.gg/c6n3wbR6 Thanks again for playing!
